comment: The packaging was incredible! As a collector, I hate bent spines, but my hardcovers arrived in pristine condition.
Great selection of indie authors that I couldn't find elsewhere. Shipping took a day longer than expected, but worth the wait.
I love the 'Book of the Month' recommendations. It has helped me get out of my reading slump!
The website interface is so smooth. Filtering by genre and trope is a game changer for my TBR list.
Decent prices, but I wish there were more signed editions available. Hope to see more stock soon.
The loyalty points system is actually rewarding! I already earned enough for a free bookmark and a discounted paperback.
Solid customer service. I had an issue with a duplicate order and they resolved it within twenty minutes on live chat.
Best online community for book lovers. The review section here actually feels like talking to friends.
